node.title: Offering Job Referral for SDE-2, SDE-3, MLE-2, MLE-3 and DS-2, DS-3 roles at Uber

article.title: Offering Job Referral for SDE-2, SDE-3, MLE-2, MLE-3 and DS-2, DS-3 roles at Uber
article.content:
If you are interested and have relevant skills and experience, you can email me your resume on aanon5168[AT]g_m_a_i_l[dot]c_o_m .
I'm an SDE at Uber and I'll refer the qualified candidates. For strong candidates, apart from a referral, I'll personally send their CV to the recruiters who are hiring for above roles, so the chances of atleast getting an interview loop will be very high. 

PS. If I use my entire email address in the post, my post didn't become visible to anyone else expect me, hence had to type my email in a distorted way above.

post.content: is there any opportunity for fresher in uber?\n
